violations.text: The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the three bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2024
The receptacle in the women's restroom is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2024

The floor and wall junctures in the ware-washing area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2024
The walls and ceiling in the mop sink area are constructed of material that is not easily cleanable and non-absorbent. New Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2024
